narrative_trail: Groundwork: targets Auth Service, Customer Portal, Admin Panel
Union: Team Anvil + Apex Digital own related work orders
Cityhall: triggers ApprovalGate (Platform Engineering) and UAT sign-off (Customer-Facing Apps)
Yard: recent test runs against auth-service and customer-portal envs reference this CR

bylaws.description: All production deployments require CTO or Engineering Director sign-off
Platform changes must deploy Mon-Fri 09:00-17:00 ET unless on-call approved
Customer-facing systems need UAT sign-off from product owner before prod
Q4 peak-season deployment freeze — no prod changes Nov 15 through Jan 5
Core systems (route-optimizer, OMS, driver-api) require 30-min quiesce before UAT promotion
Any change touching auth-service or config-service requires security team approval

change_requests.description: First phase of CRM sunset: export all customer and contact records from legacy-crm to Hubspot. DevStar leading. No downtime required — read-only migration script.
change_requests.summary: Legacy CRM → Hubspot migration (phase 1: data export)

change_requests.description: Phase 2 of MFA rollout: enforce TOTP for all internal users. Requires auth-service config change + customer-portal login flow update. Coordination with admin-panel for user onboarding flow.
Upgrade route-optimizer to v2.4 which adds real-time traffic integration via Google Maps Traffic API. Requires geocoding-service dependency bump. Blast radius: driver-api, customer-portal.
change_requests.summary: Route Optimizer v2.4 — dynamic re-routing on traffic events

change_requests.description: Stripe v2 API deprecated Q3. Migrating order-management to Stripe v3 SDK. Breaking change in webhook payload shape — notification-service and invoice-engine need coordinated update.
change_requests.summary: OMS — migrate payment gateway from Stripe v2 to v3

change_requests.description: Extend ETL to ingest carrier tracking events from FedEx Firehose. New data source feeds analytics-platform and reporting-dashboard. NorthBridge leading implementation.
change_requests.summary: ETL Pipeline — add carrier telemetry source

description: Mid-size logistics / last-mile freight delivery company (~250 employees). Fictional test dataset for Manifold.

deployables.description: Append-only compliance audit trail. On-demand releases. No test env — append-only, production-validated.
deployables.name: Audit Log

deployables.description: Kafka-backed async messaging backbone. Monthly releases. Dev sandbox env only.
deployables.name: Event Bus

deployables.description: Feature flags and runtime configuration. On-demand releases. Dev isolated env.
deployables.name: Config Service

deployables.description: Old customer relationship management system (being replaced by new CRM). On-demand patches only. No test env — too risky to replicate.
deployables.name: Legacy CRM

deployables.description: Rate-limited API gateway for third-party integrators. Bi-weekly releases. Dev + staging envs.
deployables.name: Customer API Gateway

deployables.description: Snowflake loader — transforms and loads from ETL. Quarterly releases. No dedicated test env.
deployables.name: Data Warehouse Loader

deployables.description: Central OMS handling order intake, status, and fulfilment workflow. Bi-weekly releases. Dev + UAT envs.
deployables.name: Order Management System

deployables.description: External customs API for cross-border shipments. Quarterly releases. External vendor sandbox only.
deployables.name: Customs Clearance Integration

deployables.description: SMS and WhatsApp delivery via Twilio. Continuous CD. Mock-only env (Twilio test mode).
deployables.name: SMS Gateway

deployables.description: Internal dispatcher UI — assign jobs, monitor drivers, handle exceptions. Monthly releases. Dev stub only.
deployables.name: Dispatch Console

deployables.description: Android driver application. Bi-weekly Play Store releases. Test via AWS Device Farm only.
deployables.name: Driver App Android

deployables.description: Fleet tracker — vehicle assignments, maintenance schedules, fuel logs. Monthly releases. Shared UAT.
deployables.name: Fleet Management

deployables.description: Internal admin for ops team — user management, config, manual overrides. Quarterly releases. No test env; feature-flagged in prod.
deployables.name: Admin Panel

deployables.description: S3-backed object storage API — POD photos, documents. On-demand releases. No dedicated test env; mock via stub.
deployables.name: File Storage

deployables.description: Google Maps wrapper — address validation, lat/lng lookup. On-demand releases. No test env; uses Google Maps test API key.
deployables.name: Geocoding Service

deployables.description: BI dashboard — KPIs, SLA breach reports, driver performance. Quarterly releases. No test env; uses prod snapshots.
deployables.name: Reporting Dashboard

deployables.description: Fan-out push notifications, email, and SMS alerts. Bi-weekly releases. Dev stub env only.
deployables.name: Notification Service

deployables.description: ClickHouse-backed analytics for ops and executive dashboards. Quarterly releases. No test env — cost prohibitive.
deployables.name: Analytics Platform

deployables.description: Nightly ETL from operational DBs to data warehouse. Monthly releases. Dev isolated env only.
deployables.name: ETL Pipeline

deployables.description: Third-party carrier APIs — FedEx, UPS, USPS rate shopping and tracking. Monthly releases. External sandbox envs.
deployables.name: Carrier Integration

deployables.description: iOS driver application. Bi-weekly App Store releases. Test via AWS Device Farm only.
deployables.name: Driver App iOS

deployables.description: Core routing engine — optimises last-mile delivery paths in real time. Weekly releases. Full test env stack.
deployables.name: Route Optimizer

deployables.description: AuthN/AuthZ — JWT issuance, RBAC, MFA. Bi-weekly releases. Full test env stack; changes require security sign-off.
deployables.name: Auth Service

deployables.description: Public shipment tracking page (no auth). Weekly releases. No dedicated test env — tests against staging OMS.
deployables.name: Tracking Page

deployables.description: Mobile backend for driver apps — job assignment, proof of delivery, GPS telemetry. Weekly releases.
deployables.name: Driver Service

deployables.description: Billing and invoice generation from completed orders. Monthly releases. UAT sandbox only.
deployables.name: Invoice Engine

deployables.description: Transactional email via SendGrid. Continuous CD. Mock-only env (Mailtrap).
deployables.name: Email Service

deployables.description: WMS — inbound receiving, pick/pack, outbound manifests. Quarterly releases. Shared UAT with fleet.
deployables.name: Warehouse Management

deployables.description: Deprecated driver app — sunset in progress, migrating users to v2. No new releases. No test env.
deployables.name: Old Driver App (v1)

deployables.description: Web portal for shippers — booking, tracking, invoices. Weekly releases. Dev + staging envs.
deployables.name: Customer Portal

teams.description: Agency — legacy CRM modernisation and old driver app sunset
teams.name: DevStar

work_orders.summary: Add WhatsApp delivery channel for driver alerts
Upgrade Kafka from 3.4 to 3.8 — rolling restart plan
New carrier telemetry dashboard in analytics (CR-004)
Admin panel: bulk user onboarding for MFA rollout (CR-003)
MFA enforcement rollout — TOTP for internal users (CR-003)
Update portal login flow for MFA phase 2 (CR-003)
Integrate Google Maps Traffic API for dynamic re-routing (CR-001)
Stripe v3 migration — webhook payload adapter (CR-002)
Add FedEx Firehose source to ETL pipeline (CR-004)
Phase 1: Export all CRM records to Hubspot (CR-005)
Sunset old driver app — push final users to v2 app
Add estimated delivery time to tracking page
Driver app: offline POD capture retry queue
Auth Service: rotate JWT signing keys + publish JWKS
Notification Service: SendGrid v3 SDK upgrade
Warehouse: barcode scanner SDK update to Zebra v6
Customer Portal: redesign tracking timeline component
Analytics: SLA breach report v2 with carrier breakdown
Invoice Engine: VAT handling for EU shipments
Legacy CRM: read-only audit dump for compliance

data_sources.name: meridian-prod-snapshot
data_sources.notes: Weekly anonymised snapshot of order + shipment data from production.

data_sources.name: synthetic-shipments
data_sources.notes: Generator-script-driven synthetic shipment dataset for isolated envs.

data_sources.name: fedex-mock
data_sources.notes: FedEx sandbox Firehose; replayed events for ETL telemetry tests.

data_syncs.notes: Pulls weekly prod snapshot into OMS UAT for realistic UAT scenarios.
Pushes synthetic shipment batches into route-optimizer dev for routing tests.
Replays FedEx sandbox Firehose into ETL dev for carrier telemetry pipeline tests.
Route staging shares OMS dev order seed via the shared event bus topic.

mock_sources.name: Google Maps Test Key
mock_sources.notes: GCP test project API key with geocoding quota limits

mock_sources.name: Mailtrap (email sandbox)
mock_sources.notes: Captures outbound email; asserts subject/body in test suites

mock_sources.name: WireMock OMS Stub
mock_sources.notes: WireMock recording of OMS API responses for tracking-page tests

mock_sources.name: Carrier Sandbox Accounts
mock_sources.notes: FedEx/UPS/USPS sandbox API credentials and test shipment IDs

mock_sources.name: Twilio Test Credentials
mock_sources.notes: Twilio magic numbers for SMS delivery simulation

test_environments.name: route-optimizer / dev (isolated)
test_environments.notes: Spun up per-PR via GitHub Actions. Torn down on merge or 60-min timeout.

test_environments.name: email-service / mock (Mailtrap)
test_environments.notes: Mailtrap sandbox. All outbound email captured. No real infrastructure needed.

test_environments.name: mobile-apps / external (AWS Device Farm)
test_environments.notes: Physical device pool. iOS and Android. Runs Appium tests on real hardware.

test_environments.name: order-management / UAT (multi-tenant)
test_environments.notes: Shared UAT env. Apex Digital and Orion book time slots. Manual teardown only.

test_environments.name: sms-gateway / mock (Twilio test mode)
test_environments.notes: Twilio test credentials. Magic numbers for delivery/failure simulation.

test_environments.name: notification-service / dev (stub)
test_environments.notes: Stub env with Mailtrap + Twilio test mode. No staging — relies on staging OMS events.

test_environments.name: config-service / dev (isolated)
test_environments.notes: Per-PR isolated env. Tests flag evaluation logic in isolation.

test_environments.name: invoice-engine / UAT (sandbox)
test_environments.notes: UAT-only sandbox. Seeded with synthetic order data. No dev env — tested via OMS dev.

test_environments.name: customer-portal / staging (sandbox)
test_environments.notes: Persistent staging. Apex Digital uses this for UAT validation runs.

test_environments.name: customer-api-gateway / staging (sandbox)
test_environments.notes: Persistent staging. External partners test against this endpoint.

test_environments.name: customer-api-gateway / dev (sandbox)
test_environments.notes: Shared dev sandbox. Used for integration tests with Apex Digital integrators.

test_environments.name: etl-pipeline / dev (isolated)
test_environments.notes: Isolated env with synthetic data fixtures. Long spinup due to DB snapshot restore.

test_environments.name: order-management / dev (isolated)
test_environments.notes: Isolated per-branch env. Heavy DB migrations mean longer spinup.

test_environments.contractual_limit: FedEx/UPS/USPS sandbox ToS — no production data, rate limited
test_environments.name: carrier-integration / external (vendor sandboxes)
test_environments.notes: FedEx, UPS, USPS all provide sandbox API environments. No Meridian infra required.

test_environments.name: driver-api / dev (isolated)
test_environments.notes: Isolated env with mock GPS telemetry injector. Used for unit + contract tests.

test_environments.name: auth-service / staging (sandbox)
test_environments.notes: Persistent staging env shared by all services that depend on auth. Treated as production-like.

test_environments.name: driver-api / staging (sandbox)
test_environments.notes: Persistent staging. Connected to route-optimizer staging for end-to-end flows.

test_environments.name: auth-service / dev (isolated)
test_environments.notes: Isolated per-PR. Security team reviews any test environment provisioning for auth-service.

test_environments.name: route-optimizer / staging (sandbox)
test_environments.notes: Persistent staging env. Redeployed on merge to main. Seeded with synthetic route data.

test_environments.name: event-bus / dev (sandbox)
test_environments.notes: Shared Kafka dev sandbox. All services in dev consume from this topic namespace.

test_environments.name: ops-suite / UAT (multi-tenant, shared)
test_environments.notes: Shared UAT used by both warehouse-mgmt and fleet-management. Booked via shared calendar.

test_environments.name: dispatch-console / dev (stub)
test_environments.notes: Stub env against WireMock OMS. Playwright E2E tests run here.

test_environments.name: customer-portal / dev (isolated)
test_environments.notes: Per-PR isolated env. Points to auth-service staging and OMS dev.

test_infrastructure.name: AWS ECS Cluster (eu-west-1)
test_infrastructure.notes: Fargate-based isolated envs; spins up per-PR, tears down on merge

test_infrastructure.name: AWS Device Farm
test_infrastructure.notes: Mobile device testing — iOS + Android physical device pool

test_infrastructure.name: Internal K8s (on-prem)
test_infrastructure.notes: Shared Kubernetes cluster; used for persistent sandbox envs

test_suites.description: Contract + integration tests against the customer API gateway.
test_suites.name: customer-api-suite

test_suites.description: Driver API + service-token auth flow + GPS telemetry assertions.
test_suites.name: driver-app-suite

test_suites.description: End-to-end Playwright suite against the dispatcher web UI.
test_suites.name: dispatch-console-suite

test_suites.description: Read-only contract tests for the Legacy CRM export pipeline.
test_suites.name: legacy-crm-suite

test_suites.description: Public tracking page accessibility + happy-path tests.
test_suites.name: tracking-suite

test_suites.description: Payment + Stripe webhook integration tests with sandbox accounts.
test_suites.name: payments-suite
